title: Loop node not producing output due to batch size
symptom: The Loop Over Items node receives input but does not produce output, causing subsequent nodes to fail. The workflow stops entirely at the Loop node.
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node's batch size was set to a dynamic value instead of a fixed value of 1. This prevents the loop from processing items correctly, leading to no output being generated.
fix_steps: Open the Loop Over Items node settings
agent_instruction: Change the Loop Over Items node's batch size to 1 and save the workflow.
